Briefing Notes: U.S. supports the elections in #Sudan as an initial step in Sudan's democratic transformation as envisioned in the CPA.
Briefing Notes: Goal of #Haiti Donors' Conference is to secure the foundation for Haiti's reconstruction. U.S. has committed $1.15 billion.
Briefing Notes: U.S. welcomes March 30 Serbian National Assembly resolution condemning 1995 #Srebrenica massacre. #Serbia
Briefing Notes: U.S. welcomes release of hostages Josue Calvo & Emilio Moncayo.  We send best wishes to them & their families. #Colombia

U/S Ellen Tauscher: New START Treaty does nothing to constrain missile defenses; this treaty is about offensive strategic weapons.
U/S Ellen Tauscher: New START Treaty allows us to retain the nuclear force levels we need to protect our country and our allies.
U/S Ellen Tauscher: New START Treaty enhances U.S. security by cutting 1/3 of nuclear weapons that U.S. & Russia are permitted to deploy.

RT @PressSec - POTUS: Troops "...make tremendous sacrifices far away from home; I want to make sure they know how proud" we all are of them.
RT @PressSec: (In #Afghanistan) POTUS  says main reason here is "...To just say thank you for the incredible efforts of our U.S. troops."
